initiatives.name: Association of Village Council Presidents
initiatives.description: A tribal consortium fostering mutual aid and community wellness through traditional Yup'ik values in Southwest Alaska. They coordinate social services, cultural programs, and community support while building power through Indigenous-led initiatives and creating pathways for tribal sovereignty.

initiatives.name: Bristol Bay Native Association
initiatives.description: A tribal organization fostering mutual aid and community development through traditional values in the Bristol Bay region. They coordinate social services, workforce development, and cultural preservation while building power through Indigenous-led initiatives and creating pathways for community wellbeing.
